name: Kansai Nerolac Paints Limited
summary: Kansai Nerolac Paints Limited manufactures and sells paints and varnishes, enamels, or lacquers in India. It offers interior and exterior decorative wall paints, wood coatings, metal enamel paints, and ancillary paints, as well as adhesives. The company was formerly known as Goodlass Nerolac Paints Limited and changed its name to Kansai Nerolac Paints Limited in April 2006. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. Kansai Nerolac Paints Limited is a subsidiary of Kansai Paint Co., Ltd.
